title: Scaffold tsp_neural/ — Option B2 neural-guided local search sibling
description: Build tsp_neural/ as a sibling to tsp_research/. Same harness shape (frozen prepare.py + agent-edited solve.py + 5-min budget + results.tsv) but with PyTorch in deps and the focus on training a small move-scorer to guide 2-opt/Or-opt. Mirror .claude/ tooling. Add train-policy skill. Seeded ideas in M/T/R/I classes.
close_reason: Scaffolded tsp_neural/ as Option B2 sibling to tsp_research/. Files: pyproject.toml (+torch cu128), prepare.py (copied frozen), solve.py (NN+2-opt baseline, no learning yet), program.md, AGENTS.md, README.md, ideas.md (seeded M/T/R/I/E/C classes), justfile (with train/harvest/checkpoints recipes), .gitignore, data/ symlinked to ../tsp_research/data. .claude/ mirrored from tsp_research with new train-policy skill (harvest→train→integrate workflow with val_auc gate). Outer README and AGENTS updated to document the worktree pattern for running both loops in parallel. Commit+push queued in background to land after current tsp_research cycle ends.

title: Add agent tooling: recap-writer, paper-researcher, /recap, guard hooks
description: Wire .claude/ subagents + slash command + hooks so the in-loop agent in tsp_research/ has: auto-recap (every 4 cycles), paper/algorithm research subagent, hard-blocks for prepare.py edits and dep installs.
close_reason: Wired full agent toolset into tsp_research/.claude/. Subagents: recap-writer, paper-researcher. Slash command: /recap. Skills: postmortem, profile-solver, compare-runs, algo-blueprint, evolve-tooling. Hooks: block-frozen-edits (PreToolUse on Edit/Write — guards prepare.py + recap-*.md), block-dep-install (PreToolUse on Bash — guards uv add/pip install/etc), recap-tick (PostToolUse — writes .recap-pending every 4 cycles). Justfile with 17 recipes (run, metrics, ledger, exp, log, revert, status, hist, diff, score, clean, tools, etc). AGENTS.md (project + outer) and program.md updated to surface all of it.

title: Add scipy+numba, ideas.md library, git init for branches
description: Pre-approve scipy/numba in pyproject; create ideas.md seed library with sample/grow protocol; commit scaffold to outer repo as base for tsp/<tag> branches.
close_reason: scipy+numba added to pyproject and synced (scipy 1.15.3, numba 0.65.1). ideas.md created with seeded library across 7 classes plus sample+grow protocol. program.md updated to reference ideas.md. Outer auto-rez repo committed (dd8df32 on main); branch tsp/apr25 created from there as the agent's working branch.

title: Scaffold tsp_research framework
description: Build autoresearch-style harness for Santa 2018 TSP: frozen prepare.py (data loader + score_tour), solve.py playground, program.md, results.tsv loop.
close_reason: Scaffolded tsp_research/: prepare.py (frozen, score_tour validated), solve.py (NN baseline 1.81M cost, 174s), program.md, README.md, pyproject.toml, .gitignore. Baseline run completed inside budget.
